Hello Traveler

You just found my very ephemeral web-presence. I hope to build it up very soon. In the mean-time feel free to contact me over at twitter.

Open Learning 2017

Season 2 of a project, which was (and is) inspired by Una Kravets. The idea is to share most of my learning efforts openly. For fun and glory!

R and COSERO

‘rrrcos’ and ‘viscos’ are my take for providing a unified way to guide the calibration of the rainfall-runoff model COSERO from ‘R’
